personal_info.name: Sumit Kumar
personal_info.title: GenAI & Multi-Agent Engineer | Full Stack Web Developer
personal_info.summary: Forward-thinking Generative AI & Full Stack Engineer with strong expertise in building scalable Multi-Agent Systems and RAG architectures. Currently specializing in the IIT Mandi GenAI curriculum, focusing on LLM orchestration, fine-tuning and agentic workflows using LangChain and CrewAI. Proven track record of integrating AI-driven automation into enterprise web applications (MERN/Next.js) to optimize performance and decision-making.

highlights: Integrated OCR-based invoice parsing to automate data extraction and validation, reducing manual effort and improving accuracy.
Implemented server load balancing using NGINX, ensuring high availability, optimized traffic distribution, and improved system stability.
Integrated dynamic Zoho Analytics dashboards with role-based and criteria-based filters, enhancing decision-making and data accessibility across departments.
Developed secure authentication and role-based access control using JWT and OAuth2 for internal and external stakeholders.
Improved API performance, optimized backend logic, and strengthened system scalability across the Kent RiseEngine platform.
Revamped HRMS platform using Next.js and TypeScript, improving UI performance and overall user experience.
Developed scalable and reusable UI components for the Hectare (US Toll Authority) platform, enhancing system reliability and maintainability.
Automated end-to-end test cases using Cypress and Playwright, reducing manual QA effort and improving testing efficiency.

projects.title: Scam Guard AI
projects.description: A cutting-edge AI security platform designed to detect and prevent digital scams in real-time. Built with Gemini and advanced NLP Transformers to analyze text, emails, and URLs for malicious intent.

projects.title: HireFlow AI
projects.description: An intelligent AI Resume Search platform using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture. Automates resume parsing, creates vector embeddings for semantic search, and provides recruiters with an ATS-style analytics interface to match candidates instantly.

projects.title: Kent RiseEngine
projects.description: An enterprise-grade AI invoice parser built with React and Node.js, automating data extraction. Features role-based Zoho Analytics dashboards with criteria-based views for real-time business insights.

projects.title: Kent Cam Attendance
projects.description: A highly scalable HR attendance automation system handling thousands of concurrent employees. Integrates automated data pipelines, real-time sync of check-ins, leave logs, and key HR metrics via robust REST APIs.

projects.title: TIOS Revamp
projects.description: Migrated a legacy HRMS to a modern modular architecture using Next.js. Improved performance, maintainability, and scalability by redesigning the UI/UX and restructuring the entire codebase.

projects.title: Portfolio AI
projects.description: A modern, AI-powered portfolio website featuring a RAG-based chatbot powered by Gemini and Pinecone. Includes an AI resume insights generator, dark mode, 3D visuals, and premium Framer Motion animations.

certifications.title: PG Certification in Gen AI and Multi-Agent Systems
highlights: Mastered advanced Prompt Engineering, NLP fundamentals, and RAG pipelines using Vector Databases.
Architected autonomous Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) using LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, LlamaIndex and fine-tuned Large Language Models.
Applied Deep Learning foundations and Transformer architectures to build and deploy scalable GenAI models via FastAPI.

certifications.title: Full Stack Web Developer
highlights: Trained in modern full-stack web technologies with a focus on building AI-powered web applications.
Hands-on experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and Git.

key_achievements: Delivered automation and AI-driven enhancements across platforms, improving accuracy, reliability, and workflow efficiency.
Built secure Node.js authentication with role-based login, user management, and integrated AWS certificate handling.
Improved system scalability and uptime through optimized server load handling, high-performance APIs, and refined backend logic.
Enhanced decision-making by implementing structured analytics dashboards and improving data visibility across departments.
Strengthened platform architecture with modular codebases, reusable components, and improved cross-service data flow.
